/Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/usr/bin/c++ -I/opt/homebrew/opt/libomp/include -I/opt/homebrew/opt/flex/include -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -isysroot /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX15.5.sdk -bundle -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -Xlinker -undefined -Xlinker dynamic_lookup -flto -L/opt/homebrew/opt/libomp/lib -L/opt/homebrew/opt/bison/lib -L/opt/homebrew/opt/flex/lib -o dct2_fft2_cpp.cpython-39-darwin.so CMakeFiles/dct2_fft2_cpp.dir/src/dct2_fft2.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/Users/bytedance/Documents/trae_projects/Remap/DAC25-ReMaP/.venv/lib/python3.9/site-packages/torch/lib ../utility/libutility_cxx.a /Users/bytedance/Documents/trae_projects/Remap/DAC25-ReMaP/.venv/lib/python3.9/site-packages/torch/lib/libtorch.dylib /Users/bytedance/Documents/trae_projects/Remap/DAC25-ReMaP/.venv/lib/python3.9/site-packages/torch/lib/libtorch_python.dylib /Users/bytedance/Documents/trae_projects/Remap/DAC25-ReMaP/.venv/lib/python3.9/site-packages/torch/lib/libc10.dylib /Users/bytedance/Documents/trae_projects/Remap/DAC25-ReMaP/.venv/lib/python3.9/site-packages/torch/lib/libtorch_cpu.dylib /opt/homebrew/opt/libomp/lib/libomp.dylib
